context: By 1990, Spain was deep into its post-Movida cultural renaissance and fully integrated into the European mainstream. The charts reflected a mix of domestic Spanish rock and pop — Radio Futura, El Último de la Fila, Luz Casal — alongside the international Eurodance wave. Phil Collins, Sinéad O'Connor, and Snap! competed with homegrown acts for chart dominance on Los 40 Principales.

tracks.title: Get Up (Before the Night Is Over)
